scripts.test:automation:auth: cd automation && npx playwright test tests/auth-*.spec.ts
scripts.test:automation:auth:login: cd automation && npx playwright test auth-login.spec.ts
scripts.test:automation:auth:signup: cd automation && npx playwright test auth-signup.spec.ts
scripts.test:automation:auth:org: cd automation && npx playwright test auth-organization.spec.ts
scripts.test:automation:auth:roles: cd automation && npx playwright test auth-roles-teams.spec.ts
scripts.test:automation:org-onboarding: cd automation && HEADLESS=false SLOW_MO=500 npx playwright test auth-org-onboarding.spec.ts --project=chromium --headed
scripts.test:automation:org-onboarding:debug: cd automation && HEADLESS=false SLOW_MO=1000 PWDEBUG=1 npx playwright test auth-org-onboarding.spec.ts --project=chromium --headed --debug
scripts.test:automation:org-onboarding:ui: cd automation && HEADLESS=false npx playwright test auth-org-onboarding.spec.ts --project=chromium --ui
scripts.test:automation:report: cd automation && npx playwright show-report reports/html
scripts.clean: docker exec nexora-mongodb mongosh -u root -p nexora_dev_password --quiet --eval '["nexora_auth","nexora_hr","nexora_attendance","nexora_leave","nexora_projects","nexora_tasks"].forEach(d => { db = db.getSiblingDB(d); db.getCollectionNames().forEach(c => db[c].deleteMany({})); }); print("ALL CLEARED");'
